CommunityApplications.Profile:
Backblaze 64 runs the **Backblaze Personal Backup** client (v10, 64-bit) under Wine on Ubuntu 24.04 LTS, with a browser- and VNC-based GUI. It keeps the client updated automatically and is built to run unattended on Unraid.
This is a community-maintained fork of JonathanTreffler's `backblaze-personal-wine` container, re-engineered for Backblaze's 64-bit, Windows 10-only client.
Documentation and support: https://github.com/iamfoz/backblaze-64-personal-wine-container
CommunityApplications.DonateText: If Backblaze 64 is useful to you, sponsorship helps keep it maintained.
